headline: A Look At Texas Instruments (TXN) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Event context and recent performance snapshot Texas Instruments (TXN) has been on the radar for many investors recently, with the share price at $277.14 and total return figures of 75.54% over the past year and 81.43% over 3 years. Over the past month and past 3 months, the stock has shown returns of 43.29% and 43.37% respectively. This has prompted closer attention to how its semiconductor business mix and valuation metrics might be lining up today. See our latest analysis for Texas...
